summary: Clean green run reported at 0.16.0. Plan finalized to as-built; report/ bundle written (report.md + as-built flow/class/flow-cli-awareness .mmd + diagrams.html + manifest, with the plan-time before set carried into report/before/ for compare). Both slices shipped as planned with three additive refinements (REV-002 printHelp in the lint, cli-contract command-surface anchor, REV-001 cancel-returns-to-drill, TEST-001 viewDrill renders status). Knowledge updated: test-strategy.md (assert View() output, not just Model.status) + code-review-standards.md (rendered-not-just-set reviewer check). All gates green; no open issues (TEST-002 user-skipped per D6). state.md → awaiting-uat.
